user.title: Fujitsu AC IR Setup
user.description: Configure a Fujitsu air conditioner controlled via an IR blaster.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this air conditioner.
data_description.transport_type: The type of IR blaster hardware.

blaster.title: Select IR Blaster Entity
blaster.description: Choose the remote entity for your IR blaster.

data_description.broadlink_device: The remote entity that will send IR commands (e.g. remote.broadlink_rm4).

esphome.title: ESPHome Device
esphome.description: Enter the ESPHome device node name. The device must expose a 'send_raw_ir' API service. See the documentation for the required ESPHome YAML configuration.

data_description.broadlink_device: The 'name' field from your ESPHome device YAML (e.g. ir_blaster).

error.entity_not_found: The specified remote entity was not found.
error.invalid_device_name: Please enter a valid ESPHome device name.

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured for a Fujitsu AC.
